title: alangium javanicum var. ebenaceum
intro: Alangium javanicum var. ebenaceum, also known as the Ebony Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Alangiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Alangium javanicum var. ebenaceum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and may also be used in the form of capsules or tablets for its medicinal properties.
